Metadata.title: NoProblemo
Metadata.description: A calm place to shape problems before you solve them.

Home.title: Turn a messy challenge into a clearer next step.
Home.description: NoProblemo helps you write down the problem, compare options, and leave with a simple action plan. Start as a guest now; create an account later when you want cloud saving or collaboration.

what.title: What NoProblemo is
what.body: A lightweight problem-solving workspace for people who want structure before decisions. It keeps the first step quiet, practical, and focused.

guest.title: Start as guest
guest.body: Use the workflow without login. Your temporary draft stays in this browser only and can be copied or exported as Markdown.

account.title: Account when needed
account.body: Login and account creation are placeholders for now. Later, accounts will unlock saving, groups, and collaboration.

workflow.title: A simple path through the problem

capture.title: Capture the challenge
capture.body: Write the problem in plain language and add the context that matters.

shape.title: Shape possible answers
shape.body: List options, tradeoffs, and the outcome you want to reach.

choose.title: Choose a next step
choose.body: End with one practical action you can take without needing a full project setup.

collaboration.title: Collaboration comes after clarity
collaboration.body: Guest mode is private to this browser. Groups, invites, messages, members, and shared projects will require login in a later phase.
collaboration.note: This keeps the public experience useful without exposing private project data or creating unfinished collaboration flows.

guest.title: No account required to start
guest.body: Begin with the problem itself instead of an onboarding flow.

structured.title: Structured but lightweight
structured.body: The workflow gives enough shape to move without turning into a heavy project manager.

private.title: Local by default
private.body: Guest work stays in browser storage and is not sent to Supabase.

Solve.title: Start a problem-solving session without login.
Solve.body: Use this temporary workspace to clarify a challenge. Guest work is stored only in this browser and can be copied or exported before you leave.

workspace.title: Problem-solving workflow
workspace.localNotice: Your guest draft is saved in local browser storage. It is not sent to Supabase.

problem.label: What problem are you solving?
problem.placeholder: Describe the challenge in one or two plain sentences.

context.label: What context matters?
context.placeholder: Add constraints, people involved, deadlines, or background.

outcome.label: What would a good outcome look like?

options.label: What options are on the table?
options.placeholder: List possible approaches, tradeoffs, or open questions.

nextStep.label: What is the next practical step?
nextStep.placeholder: Choose one action you can take next.

workspace.copyFallback: Copy failed. You can select the summary and copy it manually.

guestLimits.title: Guest mode limits
guestLimits.body: These actions need an account because they would save or share data beyond this browser.

LoginPrompt.title: Login required for saving and collaboration
LoginPrompt.body: You can use NoProblemo without an account, but login is required to save your work and collaborate with others.
LoginPrompt.loginAndSave: Log in and save this challenge
LoginPrompt.signupAndSave: Create account and save this challenge

Support.title: Contact NoProblemo support
Support.body: For help, feedback, or questions about this early version, contact support by email.
Support.helpText: Do not send passwords, private keys, payment details, or sensitive personal information.

login.title: Login is not built yet.
login.body: Authentication is planned for a later phase. For now, continue as guest and keep work in this browser.

signup.title: Account creation is not built yet.
signup.body: Accounts will later support cloud saving and collaboration. For now, guest mode keeps your draft local.

login.title: Log in to save your work.
login.body: Guest mode stays available. Log in when you want cloud saving and future collaboration features.

signup.title: Create an account for future saved work.
signup.body: Use email signup now. Saved dashboards and guest import are planned for the next phase.
signup.logIn: Already have an account? Log in

oauth.title: Or continue with a provider
oauth.note: Google and Apple require provider configuration in Supabase before they work in production.

status.check-email: اکاؤنٹ بن گیا۔ تصدیق کے لیے اپنا ای میل دیکھیں، پھر NoProblemo پر واپس آئیں۔
status.password-updated: پاس ورڈ اپ ڈیٹ ہو گیا۔ نئے پاس ورڈ سے لاگ ان کریں۔
status.reset-email-sent: اگر اس ای میل کا اکاؤنٹ ہے تو ری سیٹ لنک بھیج دیا گیا ہے۔
status.recovery-ready: ری سیٹ لنک کی تصدیق ہو گئی۔ نیا پاس ورڈ منتخب کریں۔
status.email-confirmed-login-required: آپ کا ای میل پہلے ہی تصدیق شدہ ہو سکتا ہے۔ جاری رکھنے کے لیے لاگ ان کریں۔
status.recovery-checking: آپ کا ری سیٹ لنک چیک کیا جا رہا ہے...
status.signup-check-email: اکاؤنٹ بن گیا۔ لاگ ان سے پہلے اپنا ای میل تصدیق کریں۔
status.signup-existing-or-pending: اگر اس ای میل کا اکاؤنٹ یا زیر التوا تصدیق ہے تو تصدیقی ای میل استعمال کریں یا لاگ ان کریں۔
status.signup-confirmation-resent: اگر یہ ای میل تصدیقی لنک وصول کر سکتا ہے تو نیا ای میل بھیج دیا گیا ہے۔
status.account-deleted: آپ کا اکاؤنٹ حذف کر دیا گیا ہے۔

errors.missing-fields: Enter both email and password to continue.
errors.invalid-credentials: The email or password did not match an account.
errors.weak-password: Use a password with at least 8 characters.
errors.signup-failed: اکاؤنٹ نہیں بن سکا۔ تفصیلات چیک کریں یا دوبارہ کوشش کریں۔
errors.oauth-provider: That login provider is not available.
errors.oauth-start: The provider login could not start. Check Supabase provider setup.

errors.auth-required: Log in to access saved work. Guest mode remains available without an account.
errors.missing-email: ری سیٹ لنک کے لیے اپنا ای میل درج کریں۔
errors.reset-request-failed: ری سیٹ ای میل نہیں بھیجی جا سکی۔ پتہ چیک کریں یا دوبارہ کوشش کریں۔
errors.password-mismatch: پاس ورڈز ایک جیسے نہیں ہیں۔
errors.password-update-failed: پاس ورڈ اپ ڈیٹ نہیں ہو سکا۔ نیا ری سیٹ لنک مانگیں۔
errors.reset-link-invalid: ری سیٹ لنک غلط یا ختم ہو چکا ہے۔ نیا لنک مانگیں۔
errors.recovery-callback: ری سیٹ لنک نہیں کھل سکا۔ نیا ری سیٹ لنک درخواست کریں اور دوبارہ کوشش کریں۔
errors.signup-weak-password: کم از کم 8 حروف کا پاس ورڈ استعمال کریں۔

errors.signup-invalid-email: درست ای میل پتہ درج کریں۔
errors.signup-provider-disabled: ای میل سائن اپ ابھی دستیاب نہیں۔ Supabase Auth سیٹنگز چیک کریں۔

forgot.title: اپنا پاس ورڈ ری سیٹ کریں۔
forgot.body: اپنے اکاؤنٹ کا ای میل درج کریں۔ اگر اکاؤنٹ موجود ہے تو ہم محفوظ لنک بھیجیں گے۔

reset.title: نیا پاس ورڈ منتخب کریں۔
reset.body: ای میل کے ری سیٹ لنک کو استعمال کریں، پھر نیا پاس ورڈ سیٹ کریں۔

resend.title: نیا تصدیقی ای میل چاہیے؟
resend.body: اپنا ای میل درج کریں، اگر اکاؤنٹ لنک وصول کر سکتا ہے تو ہم نیا ای میل بھیجیں گے۔

ProtectedApp.title: Authentication is ready.
ProtectedApp.body: This protected placeholder verifies the session flow. The full dashboard, saved challenges, and guest import begin in Phase 6.
ProtectedApp.phaseNote: No dashboard data is saved or imported in Phase 5.

Dashboard.title: Welcome back.
Dashboard.body: Manage saved challenges, import guest work from this device, and continue where you left off.
Dashboard.futureNote: Friends, groups, and messages are planned for later phases.

guestImport.title: You have unsaved guest work on this device.
guestImport.body: Import it to your account to continue later. The import creates a private draft challenge owned by your logged-in user.
guestImport.importedBody: This device has already imported the current guest draft. You can continue from the saved challenge.

messages.success: Guest work was imported to your account.
messages.alreadyImported: This guest draft was already imported from this device.
messages.missingDraft: No guest draft was sent for import.
messages.invalidDraft: The guest draft could not be read.
messages.authRequired: Log in before importing guest work.
messages.createFailed: The saved challenge could not be created.
messages.sectionsFailed: The challenge was created, but its sections could not be imported.

active.title: My active challenges
active.body: Draft and active saved challenges linked to your account.

recent.title: Latest saved challenges
recent.body: Recent cloud challenges available through your authenticated session.

empty.title: No saved challenges yet.
empty.body: Create a cloud draft or import guest work from this device when you are ready.

errors.listBody: Check Supabase configuration, migration status, and RLS policies.

status.account-created: اکاؤنٹ بن گیا۔ اب آپ اپنا کام محفوظ اور منظم کر سکتے ہیں۔
status.email-confirmed: ای میل کی تصدیق ہو گئی۔ آپ کا اکاؤنٹ تیار ہے۔

CreateChallenge.title: Create a saved challenge.
CreateChallenge.body: Start with a title and short description. The full structured workspace begins in Phase 7.

fields.title: Title
fields.shortDescriptionPlaceholder: Add a short context note, optional

errors.missing-title: Add a title before creating the challenge.
errors.create-failed: The challenge could not be created. Check Supabase setup and RLS policies.

ChallengeDetail.phaseSevenBody: This page lets you continue to a saved challenge and review imported sections. Editing the full structured workflow belongs to the next phase.

sections.title: Imported sections
sections.none: No sections have been saved for this challenge yet.

Settings.title: Manage your basic profile.
Settings.body: Update your display name and preferred language. Advanced account management is planned for later phases.
Settings.localeNote: پسندیدہ زبان آپ کے پروفائل میں محفوظ ہوتی ہے۔ محفوظ کرنے کے بعد یہ سیٹنگز صفحہ منتخب زبان میں کھلے گا۔

status.password-saved: پاس ورڈ اپ ڈیٹ ہو گیا۔

errors.updateFailed: Profile settings could not be saved. Check Supabase setup and RLS policies.
errors.profile-update-failed: پروفائل سیٹنگز محفوظ نہیں ہو سکیں۔ Supabase سیٹ اپ اور RLS پالیسیاں چیک کریں۔
errors.password-weak: کم از کم 8 حروف کا پاس ورڈ استعمال کریں۔
errors.password-mismatch: پاس ورڈز ایک جیسے نہیں ہیں۔
errors.password-update-failed: پاس ورڈ اپ ڈیٹ نہیں ہو سکا۔ دوبارہ کوشش کریں۔
errors.account-delete-confirmation: جاری رکھنے سے پہلے اکاؤنٹ حذف کرنے کی تصدیق کریں۔
errors.account-delete-unavailable: اس سرور پر اکاؤنٹ حذف کرنا ترتیب نہیں دیا گیا۔
errors.account-delete-failed: اکاؤنٹ حذف نہیں ہو سکا۔ دوبارہ کوشش کریں یا سپورٹ سے رابطہ کریں۔

routeLanguage.title: صفحہ کی زبان
routeLanguage.body: اس صفحہ کی دکھائی دینے والی زبان بدلیں۔ صارف کا لکھا ہوا مواد نہیں بدلے گا۔

password.title: پاس ورڈ تبدیل کریں
password.body: اس اکاؤنٹ کے لیے نیا پاس ورڈ سیٹ کریں۔ پاس ورڈ صرف Supabase Auth کو بھیجے جاتے ہیں اور پروفائل ٹیبلز میں محفوظ نہیں ہوتے۔

danger.title: خطرہ زون
danger.body: یہ اکاؤنٹ صرف یقین ہونے پر حذف کریں۔ یہ عمل مستقل ہے۔

effects.auth: آپ کا Supabase Auth صارف ہٹا دیا جائے گا۔
effects.data: آپ کا پروفائل اور آپ کے ریکارڈز ڈیٹابیس foreign keys کے مطابق حذف ہوں گے۔
effects.anonymized: کچھ پیغامات یا سرگرمی تاریخ کے لیے آپ کے user id کے بغیر رہ سکتے ہیں۔
effects.irreversible: یہ عمل واپس نہیں ہو سکتا۔

danger.confirmCheckbox: میں سمجھتا/سمجھتی ہوں کہ میرا اکاؤنٹ حذف کرنا مستقل ہے۔

Workspace.sectionsBody: Save the structured notes for this challenge. Missing rows are created safely when you save.

details.title: Challenge details
details.body: Keep the basic challenge information current before working through the steps.

workflow.title: Seven-step workflow
workflow.body: Move through the steps at your own pace. Save sections, solutions, tasks, and conclusions as the work becomes clearer.

define.title: Define the problem
define.body: Write the problem clearly and keep it narrow enough to solve.

understand.title: Understand the situation
understand.body: Capture context, affected people, why it matters, and possible causes.

brainstorm.title: Brainstorm possible solutions
brainstorm.body: Add candidate solutions without judging them too early.

evaluate.title: Evaluate pros and cons
evaluate.body: Compare benefits, downsides, risk, effort, and impact.

choose.title: Choose the best solution
choose.body: Write the final recommendation or decision.

action.title: Create an action plan
action.body: Turn the recommendation into practical tasks.

review.title: Review, learn, and improve
review.body: Summarize the outcome and what should be improved next time.

problem_title.title: Problem title
problem_title.help: State the problem in one clear sentence or short paragraph.

short_description.title: Short description
short_description.help: Add a concise explanation of what is happening.

background_context.title: Background/context
background_context.help: Describe the situation, history, constraints, and relevant facts.

who_is_affected.title: Who is affected
who_is_affected.help: List people, teams, customers, users, or groups affected by the problem.

why_it_matters.title: Why it matters
why_it_matters.help: Explain impact, urgency, risks, costs, or opportunities.

possible_causes.title: Possible causes
possible_causes.help: Capture likely causes, contributing factors, or assumptions to test.

final_recommendation.title: Final recommendation
final_recommendation.help: Write the chosen solution and why it is the best option now.

summary.title: Summary/review
summary.help: Summarize the conclusion, lessons learned, and next review point.

solutions.title: Possible solutions
solutions.body: Create, compare, rank, and refine candidate solutions. Scores are simple 1 to 5 values.

tasks.title: Tasks/actions
tasks.body: Create practical next actions. Responsible person is plain text for now; no user assignment or notifications are included.

errorMessages.details-missing-title: Add a title before saving challenge details.
errorMessages.details-save-failed: Challenge details could not be saved.
errorMessages.sections-save-failed: Challenge sections could not be saved.
errorMessages.solution-missing-title: Add a solution title before saving.
errorMessages.task-missing-title: Add a task title before saving.

export.title: Markdown export
export.body: Copy or download a readable Markdown summary of this challenge. PDF export remains a future feature.
export.copyFallback: Copy failed. You can use the download option instead.

messages.title: Discussion
messages.body: Keep a simple challenge discussion with people who can access this challenge.
messages.viewerReadOnly: You can read this discussion, but your current role cannot send messages.

Friends.title: Friends and requests
Friends.body: Send requests by display name or exact profile id. Friendship does not grant access to private challenges.

search.title: Find a profile
search.body: Search is limited to display name or exact profile id and does not expose email addresses.

errors.friend-invalid-user: Choose another user before sending a request.
errors.friend-request-failed: Friend request could not be sent. It may already be pending.
errors.friend-response-failed: Friend request could not be updated.

Groups.title: Groups
Groups.body: Create private groups, invite members, and link selected challenges for collaboration.

mine.title: My groups
mine.empty: You are not a member of any groups yet.

errors.group-invitation-response-failed: Group invitation could not be updated.

GroupsNew.title: Create a private group.
GroupsNew.body: Start a group for selected collaborators. Groups are private in this phase.

errors.group-name-required: Add a group name before creating the group.

challenges.title: Linked challenges
challenges.empty: No challenges linked to this group yet.
challenges.noneToLink: No owned challenges available to link.

errors.group-invite-failed: Group invitation could not be sent.
errors.group-role-update-failed: Member role could not be updated.

messages.title: Group messages
messages.body: Share short updates with accepted group members.
messages.viewerReadOnly: Viewers can read group messages but cannot send messages.

Notifications.title: Notifications
Notifications.body: Private updates for your account, groups, and challenges.

Admin.title: ایڈمن جائزہ
Admin.body: A protected operational view with aggregate counts and limited metadata only.

verification.title: Live Supabase verification needed
verification.body: Phase 10 adds local migrations and RLS/RPC rules. Apply and test them against the real Supabase project before relying on production admin data.
verification.error: Some admin data could not be loaded. Check that the Phase 10 migration is applied.

profiles.title: Profiles
profiles.body: Limited profile metadata for admin review. Emails and auth.users data are not shown.

audit.title: Admin audit log
audit.body: Sensitive admin mutations should be logged here when those actions are added.

AdminSettings.title: ایڈمن تیاری فہرست
AdminSettings.body: A local status view for deployment, Supabase verification, and support setup.

appStatus.title: App status
appStatus.adminProtected: Admin routes are protected by profiles.role.
appStatus.dashboard: Dashboard and protected app routes remain available.
appStatus.guestMode: Guest mode remains local browser storage only.
appStatus.messages: Messages, notifications, and activity remain protected by RLS.

supabase.title: Supabase
supabase.phase10Migration: Apply the Phase 10 migration in Supabase.
supabase.rls: Review RLS policies with real authenticated users.
supabase.firstAdmin: Assign the first admin manually in Supabase SQL.
supabase.liveVerification: Verify admin RPC behavior before production use.

deployment.title: Deployment
deployment.envTemplates: Use templates only; do not expose real secret values.
deployment.noAutomation: Email automation, Resend, and Vercel Cron are intentionally not used.
deployment.validation: Run lint, typecheck, and build before deployment.

environment.title: Environment variables
environment.body: This checklist shows variable names only, never real values.

support.title: Support
support.body: Use this public address for MVP support and feedback.

boundaries.title: Phase boundaries
boundaries.body: Phase 10 does not add payments, AI, email automation, Resend, Vercel Cron, billing, or support tickets.
